code:
import io
import string

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut i = 0
mut in_token = false
mut sign = 1
mut value = 0
mut count = 0

while i < n
  let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
  match bopt
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
      if in_token
        if value * sign > 0
          count = count + 1
        end
        in_token = false
        sign = 1
        value = 0
      end
    else if b == 45
      in_token = true
      sign = -1
      value = 0
    else if b == 43
      in_token = true
      sign = 1
      value = 0
    else
      if not in_token
        in_token = true
        sign = 1
        value = 0
      end
      value = value * 10 + (b - 48)
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_token
  if value * sign > 0
    count = count + 1
  end
end

println("positive=#{count}")
